title: 18A: teams + virtual_keys store (gvk- prefix, SHA-256 hash, budget fields, request_log virtual_key_id column)
verification: go test ./internal/store/... -count=1; raw key returned once on create, list returns prefix only; additive migration applied

title: 18A: governance domain (hierarchical key+team budget/RPM/TPM enforcement, lazy budget reset, repository interface)
verification: go test ./internal/governance/... -count=1 with fakes; budget exhaustion→403, period rollover resets, key RPM passes but team RPM exceeded→429

title: 18A: middleware wiring (gvk- checked before api_keys in /v1/* auth, post-request usage accumulation on key+team, virtual-keys + teams CRUD handlers, audit)
verification: go test ./api/... -count=1; raw vkey works on /v1/*, regular keys unaffected, usage survives restart, snake_case envelope, audit rows written

title: 18B: routing_rules + model_limits store + routing-rules/model-limits CRUD handlers
verification: go test ./internal/store/... ./api/... -count=1; additive migration; envelope + audit on mutating routes

title: 18B: proxy wiring (TTL-cached routing rules applied in priority order BEFORE alias/combo resolution, invalidate on write; model_limits at dispatch — max_tokens clamp/reject, RPM limiter, key allowlist 403)
verification: go test ./internal/proxy/... -count=1; priority order respected, inactive rule skipped, no-match falls through, cache invalidates on write, disallowed key→403

title: 18C: guardrails domain (blocklist match→400, PII redaction email/phone/ssn/credit_card/ip_address → [REDACTED:<type>]) wired in dispatch BEFORE RTK/Caveman, flag-gated; settings keys + /api/guardrails GET/PUT + test endpoint
verification: go test ./internal/guardrails/... ./api/... -count=1; blocklist case-insensitive, flag off→pass-through, each PII type redacts on streaming + non-streaming

title: 18C: prompt_templates store + CRUD handlers ({{var}} variable extraction)
18C: mcp_tool_groups store + CRUD handlers, filter MCP tool injection set when group selected on key/combo
verification: go test ./internal/store/... ./internal/mcp/... -count=1; tool group filters injected tool list

title: 18D: alert_channels store (config_enc encrypted via OAuth-token pattern) + alerts domain (webhook/discord/telegram dispatch, event types, retry) + CRUD + test endpoint
verification: go test ./internal/alerts/... ./api/... -count=1; dispatch to fake webhook on event, inactive channel skipped, config_enc encrypted at rest, audit

title: 18D: feature_flags store (seeded 5 flags all 0) + GET /api/feature-flags + PUT toggle-only handler (no POST/DELETE)
verification: go test ./internal/store/... ./api/... -count=1; flag toggle persists, unknown flag→404, seeded all 0, audit on toggle

title: 18D: backup/restore handlers — export excludes secrets via null placeholders + redacted_fields manifest; restore keeps existing secrets on null, validates schema version, admin/bearer auth, both audited
verification: go test ./api/... -count=1; backup output secret-scan zero token/password values, restore round-trip keeps existing secrets on null, bad payload→400, audit rows

title: 18 checkpoint: per-phase gate + mandatory security pass; WORKFLOW table + phase-doc Outcome section
verification: go test -race ./... green, coverage ≥95.0%, security checklist recorded in Outcome, gitleaks clean
